_comment: Verified data: business_name, address, phone, FB-only status, owner_first_name='Clint' (confirmed 2026-05-17 by salesperson). years_in_business=10 / established_year=2016 per salesperson report -- treat as authoritative even though BBB filing date is 12/14/2015 (BBB filing != founding). family_owned left null pending confirmation; named-after-owner pattern strongly suggests yes but not yet verified.
service_radius: Effingham, Teutopolis, Altamont, Dieterich, and surrounding communities within 25 miles

reviews.text: Clint responded to replace my basement sanitary lift pump. He was prompt, courteous and left no mess. I highly recommend Althoff Plumbing for any related service!!
